analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit across 7 properties crawled 1,205 pages with 6.53% crawl coverage of 20,474 discovered in-scope pages. 60 confirmed broken internal documentation links identified. API reference coverage stands at 32.26% across 73 detected API pages. Code example reliability estimated at 16.95%, and only 3.4% of pages display freshness metadata. Overall audit confidence is 49.48% due to crawl limitations and 16,497 unverified links blocked by authentication or rate limiting.
strengths: Multi-project topology correctly configured; no fragmentation penalty applied across 7 documentation properties
Zero broken repository navigation links (repo_broken_links_count: 0); all GitHub/GitLab internal links functional
API page detection successful with 73 pages identified and no detection failures flagged
No trap URL patterns causing significant crawl waste (122 skipped)
risks: 60 confirmed broken internal documentation links degrading user navigation and trust
Crawl coverage critically low at 6.53% (1,205 of 20,474 pages); 93.47% of documentation not audited
16,497 links unverified due to authentication/rate-limiting; actual broken link count potentially much higher
API reference coverage at 32.26% leaves 67.74% of API surface undocumented or undetected
Example reliability at 16.95% indicates majority of code samples may be outdated, untested, or non-functional
Freshness metadata present on only 3.4% of pages; users cannot assess content currency
Overall audit confidence at 49.48% limits reliability of all findings and metrics

prioritized_actions.action: Enable authenticated crawling and increase crawl budget to reach minimum 80% coverage of 20,474 discovered pages
Remediate all 60 confirmed broken internal documentation links immediately
Implement automated example testing pipeline to improve 16.95% reliability score above 80% threshold
Add last-updated metadata to all documentation pages (currently 3.4% coverage) using CI/CD automation
Expand API reference documentation to achieve minimum 70% coverage from current 32.26%

limitations: Crawl reached only 6.53% of discoverable documentation; findings do not represent 93.47% of content that was inaccessible or skipped
16,497 links could not be verified due to authentication requirements, rate limiting, or server blocks; true broken link count unknown
External audit cannot validate technical accuracy, completeness of explanations, or correctness of architectural guidance
Example reliability is estimated through heuristics; actual runtime validity requires environment-specific testing
Multi-site topology may hide content duplication, versioning conflicts, or canonical URL issues not detectable through crawl analysis
